raw_title: Digitalization and Meaning in Journalistic Work (MJoW): The Increasing Importance of the Symbolic Dimension
title_en: Digitalization and Meaning in Journalistic Work (MJoW): The Increasing Importance of the Symbolic Dimension
title_zh: Digitalization and Meaning in Journalistic Work (MJoW): The Increasing Importance of the Symbolic Dimension
plain_summary_en: This paper studies Digitalization and Meaning in Journalistic Work (MJoW): The Increasing Importance of the Symbolic Dimension. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Meaning (existential), Dimension (graph theory), Work (physics), Sociology. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies Digitalization and Meaning in Journalistic Work (MJoW): The Increasing Importance of the Symbolic Dimension. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Meaning (existential), Dimension (graph theory), Work (physics), Sociology. The abstract suggests a mixed methods approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Meaning (existential), Dimension (graph theory), Work (physics), Sociology, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
research_direction_zh: The paper points to an active research direction around Meaning (existential), Dimension (graph theory), Work (physics), Sociology, especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
